positive: A stylized, symmetrical depiction of a fantastical forest biome at dawn. The scene features interconnected bioluminescent flora, crystalline moss formations, and silhouetted, ethereal fauna (like glowing moths or crystalline deer). The primary composition should be circular and centered, using strong, dark foreground silhouettes against a vibrant, contrasting background gradient of deep indigo, emerald green, and soft cyan. The overall style is highly detailed, graphic, neo-tribal/mystical, vector-art quality, high contrast line work, excellent for screen printing on fabric. Emphasis on clean lines, solid shapes, and dramatic lighting that makes the bioluminescence pop.
negative: photorealism, blurry, noisy, text, watermark, signature, poor anatomy, extra limbs, bad composition, low quality, cartoon, realistic photo, logo, brand, typeface
